        // Intentionally not a static method because we create a delegate to it. Invoking delegates to instance
        // methods is almost as fast as virtual calls. Static methods need to go through a shuffle thunk.
        private void PersonSerializeHandler(global::System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, global::TestApp.Person? value)
        {
            if (value is null)
            {
                writer.WriteNullValue();
                return;
            }
            
            writer.WriteStartObject();

            writer.WriteString(PropName_Name, ((global::TestApp.Person)value).Name);
            writer.WriteNumber(PropName_Age, ((global::TestApp.Person)value).Age);

            writer.WriteEndObject();
        }
